description: Northpointe Bancshares, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for Northpointe Bank provides various banking products and services in the United States. It operates through two segments: Mortgage Purchase Program and Retail Banking. The company offers digital deposit banking, such as noninterest-bearing accounts, savings, money-market demand accounts, and certificates of deposits; personal and business banking; and health saving accounts; home loans; mortgage purchase program; residential mortgage lending; and custodial deposit services. Northpointe Bancshares, Inc. was incorporated in 1998
